sections.intent: Introduction to Aalto University's identity and mission -> Overview of its academic structure and research strengths -> Call to action for engagement and visit

slides.intent: Introduce the presentation topic and establish a direct, practical tone for the audience.
slides.layoutHint: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto University is a leading Finnish institution focused on innovation, sustainability, and interdisciplinary education. without reducing readability.
mustInclude: Aalto University is a leading Finnish institution focused on innovation, sustainability, and interdisciplinary education.

slides.intent: Explain the academic structure and open learning opportunities available at the university.
slides.layoutHint: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto operates through six schools covering arts, engineering, business, and science, offering courses open to everyone regardless of background. without reducing readability.
mustInclude: Aalto operates through six schools covering arts, engineering, business, and science, offering courses open to everyone regardless of background.

slides.intent: Summarize key takeaways and invite further engagement with Aalto University.
slides.layoutHint: Include a high-contrast call-to-action button or QR code placeholder for visiting the website or viewing events.
mustInclude: Aalto fosters creative sustainability and scientific breakthroughs, inviting visitors to explore campus and upcoming events.

sections.title: Approved outline
